questionHtml: Distinguish between the terms reaction quotient, Q, and equilibrium constant, Kc.
markschemeHtml:
Q: non-equilibrium concentrations AND Kc: equilibrium concentrations

OR

Q: «measured» at any time AND Kc: «measured» at equilibrium

[1 mark]

meta.title: Distinguish between the terms reaction quotient, Q, and equilibrium constant, Kc.
